description.short: Start and manage bookkeeping audits in Teams channels.
description.full: AuditBot helps your team run bookkeeping audits directly in Microsoft Teams. Mention @AuditBot new audit <period> to start an engagement, then drop financial documents (Journal, Balance Sheet, P&L, Bank Statements) into the channel for automated processing.

commands.title: new audit
commands.description: Start a new audit engagement. Usage: new audit Q3 2026
